symptoms.symptom_name: Persistent pervasive worry with low mood and severe insomnia over two-plus weeks

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Chronic pervasive worry plus low mood and insomnia over weeks is the core of an anxious-depressive presentation.

symptoms.symptom_name: Acute chest tightness, palpitations, tachypnoea and sense of doom, resolving with slowed breathing

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Abrupt autonomic surge with impending-doom cognition, resolving with breathing, is characteristic of panic.
Chest tightness with palpitations cannot be attributed to panic remotely; a cardiac cause must be safety-netted and excluded in person if it recurs.

symptoms.symptom_name: Passive suicidal ideation without plan, intent, or access to means

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute exacerbation of GAD with depression
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Passive death wish reflects the depth of the depressive-anxious crisis; it is the pivotal risk element driving triage and safety-netting.

symptoms.symptom_name: Overwhelming workplace stress and recent relationship conflict

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute exacerbation of GAD with depression
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Acute psychosocial stressors are the precipitant for the decompensation.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute exacerbation of GAD with depression
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A present, supportive partner is a protective factor that lowers imminent suicide risk and supports urgent-but-not-emergency disposition.

symptoms.symptom_name: Absence of manic features (no elevated mood, grandiosity, pressured speech, or euphoric reduced sleep need)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Worry-driven insomnia without euphoria or grandiosity excludes a manic phase.

symptoms.symptom_name: No illicit substance use, excess caffeine, or altered alcohol intake

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of a substance trigger argues against a substance-induced picture.

symptoms.symptom_name: Tachycardia (HR 115), mildly elevated BP (140/90) and tachypnoea (RR 22) — clinician-measured

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sympathetic arousal consistent with acute panic/distress; these are sealed clinician measurements — the AI Doctor infers arousal from the patient's reported palpitations and fast breathing, not a measured vital sign.

investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Without a structured distress measure the severity may be under-appreciated; the AI can invite self-completion but does not hold the clinician-administered score.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute exacerbation of GAD with depression
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A severe K10 corroborates the clinical severity and supports urgent assessment and a treatment plan.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: Acute anxious-depressive crisis with panic and passive suicidality
symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Acute exacerbation of GAD with depression and panic, with passive suicidal ideation
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Together these define an acute crisis requiring urgent same-day in-person assessment, not a routine care-plan review; the suicidality element sets the safety-netting.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Formal risk stratification is required and can only be done safely in person; it is the pivotal assessment.
Quantifies distress and supports the Mental Health Treatment Plan.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: In-person assessment to exclude a cardiac cause of chest pain (ECG +/- troponin) if chest pain recurs
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The chest tightness cannot be attributed to panic remotely; recurrence warrants in-person cardiac assessment.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Routine bloods / imaging for the panic episode in the acute telehealth contact
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: No remote-orderable test changes the immediate disposition; over-ordering delays the urgent in-person mental-health pathway.
